title: This Is How We Were Before, How Are You Doing Now?
original_title: Ganito Kami Noon... Paano Kayo Ngayon?
overview: Set at the turn of the 20th century during the Filipino revolution against the Spaniards and, later, the American colonizers, it follows a naive peasant through his leap of faith to become a member of an imagined community.
